name: netskope-publisher
description: Pulumi components for provisioning Netskope Private Access Publishers on AWS, Azure, GCP, Kubernetes, vSphere, and experimental Hyper-V.

netskope-publisher:index:AwsPublisher.description: Creates one or more Netskope Private Access Publisher EC2 instances and registers them with a Netskope tenant.

namePrefix.description: Prefix used to derive publisher names when explicit names are not supplied.

replicas.description: Number of publishers to create when names are not supplied.

tenantUrl.description: Netskope tenant URL used for publisher registration.

apiToken.description: Netskope API token used for publisher registration.

wizardPath.description: Netskope publisher registration wizard API path.

tags.description: Tags applied to supported provider resources.

registrations.description: Pre-created Netskope publisher registrations keyed by publisher name.

subnetId.description: AWS subnet ID for publisher network interfaces.

securityGroupIds.description: AWS security group IDs attached to publisher instances.

associatePublicIpAddress.description: Whether to associate public IP addresses.

monitoring.description: Whether to enable detailed EC2 monitoring.

bootstrap.description: Run Netskope's generic bootstrap script during cloud-init on a stock Ubuntu image. Defaults to false on AWS.

bootstrapUrl.description: URL to the Netskope generic bootstrap script.

nonat.description: Whether cloud-init should create the Netskope No-NAT marker file. Defaults to false on AWS.

installUser.description: Linux user that owns the Publisher install. Defaults to ubuntu.

installUserPassword.description: Optional password for installUser. Plain text unless installUserPasswordIsHash is true.

installUserPasswordIsHash.description: Set true when installUserPassword is already a crypt(3) hash.

installUserSshAuthorizedKeys.description: Public SSH keys installed in the install user's authorized_keys file.

deleteDefaultUser.description: When true and installUser is not ubuntu, cloud-init removes the image default ubuntu account.

guestNetworkInterface.description: Optional guest OS primary interface override applied with netplan during cloud-init.

publishers.description: Publisher registration and VM details keyed by name.

netskope-publisher:index:AzurePublisher.description: Creates one or more Netskope Private Access Publisher Azure virtual machines and registers them with a Netskope tenant.

namePrefix.description: Prefix used to derive publisher names when explicit names are not supplied.

replicas.description: Number of publishers to create when names are not supplied.

tenantUrl.description: Netskope tenant URL used for publisher registration.

apiToken.description: Netskope API token used for publisher registration.

wizardPath.description: Netskope publisher registration wizard API path.

tags.description: Tags applied to supported provider resources.

registrations.description: Pre-created Netskope publisher registrations keyed by publisher name.

adminUsername.description: Admin username configured for the VM.

adminSshPublicKey.description: SSH public key for the admin user.

networkSecurityGroupId.description: Optional network security group resource ID.

assignPublicIp.description: Whether to assign public IP addresses.

acceptMarketplaceTerms.description: Whether to accept marketplace image plan terms.

bootstrap.description: Run Netskope's generic bootstrap script during cloud-init on a stock Ubuntu image. Defaults to false on Azure.

bootstrapUrl.description: URL to the Netskope generic bootstrap script.

nonat.description: Whether cloud-init should create the Netskope No-NAT marker file. Defaults to false on Azure.

installUser.description: Linux user that owns the Publisher install. Defaults to ubuntu; adminUsername defaults to this value.

installUserPassword.description: Optional password for installUser. Plain text unless installUserPasswordIsHash is true.

installUserPasswordIsHash.description: Set true when installUserPassword is already a crypt(3) hash.

installUserSshAuthorizedKeys.description: Extra public SSH keys installed in the install user's authorized_keys file.

deleteDefaultUser.description: When true and installUser is not ubuntu, cloud-init removes the image default ubuntu account.

guestNetworkInterface.description: Optional guest OS primary interface override applied with netplan during cloud-init.

publishers.description: Publisher registration and VM details keyed by name.

netskope-publisher:index:GcpPublisher.description: Creates one or more Netskope Private Access Publisher Google Compute Engine instances and registers them with a Netskope tenant.

namePrefix.description: Prefix used to derive publisher names when explicit names are not supplied.

replicas.description: Number of publishers to create when names are not supplied.

tenantUrl.description: Netskope tenant URL used for publisher registration.

apiToken.description: Netskope API token used for publisher registration.

wizardPath.description: Netskope publisher registration wizard API path.

tags.description: Tags applied to supported provider resources.

registrations.description: Pre-created Netskope publisher registrations keyed by publisher name.

network.description: GCP VPC network self link or name.

subnetwork.description: GCP subnetwork self link or name.

image.description: GCE boot image. By default this should be a Linux image such as Ubuntu 22.04; the component installs the publisher with the Netskope bootstrap script.

bootstrap.description: Whether cloud-init should run the Netskope generic bootstrap script. Defaults to true on GCP because there is no public Netskope Publisher GCE image.

bootstrapUrl.description: URL to the Netskope generic bootstrap script.

nonat.description: Whether cloud-init should create the Netskope No-NAT marker file. Defaults to true on GCP because of the 1460-byte MTU.

installUser.description: Linux user that owns the Publisher install. Defaults to ubuntu.

installUserPassword.description: Optional password for installUser. Plain text unless installUserPasswordIsHash is true.

installUserPasswordIsHash.description: Set true when installUserPassword is already a crypt(3) hash.

installUserSshAuthorizedKeys.description: Public SSH keys installed in the install user's authorized_keys file.

deleteDefaultUser.description: When true and installUser is not ubuntu, cloud-init removes the image default ubuntu account.

guestNetworkInterface.description: Optional guest OS primary interface override applied with netplan during cloud-init.

assignPublicIp.description: Whether to assign public IP addresses.

publishers.description: Publisher registration and VM details keyed by name.

netskope-publisher:index:VspherePublishe.description: Creates one or more Netskope Private Access Publisher vSphere virtual machines and registers them with a Netskope tenant.

namePrefix.description: Prefix used to derive publisher names when explicit names are not supplied.

replicas.description: Number of publishers to create when names are not supplied.

tenantUrl.description: Netskope tenant URL used for publisher registration.

apiToken.description: Netskope API token used for publisher registration.

wizardPath.description: Netskope publisher registration wizard API path.

tags.description: Tags applied to supported provider resources.

registrations.description: Pre-created Netskope publisher registrations keyed by publisher name.

publishers.description: Publisher registration and VM details keyed by name.

netskope-publisher:index:HypervPublisher.description: Experimental component for creating one or more Netskope Private Access Publisher Hyper-V virtual machines.

namePrefix.description: Prefix used to derive publisher names when explicit names are not supplied.

replicas.description: Number of publishers to create when names are not supplied.

tenantUrl.description: Netskope tenant URL used for publisher registration.

apiToken.description: Netskope API token used for publisher registration.

wizardPath.description: Netskope publisher registration wizard API path.

registrations.description: Pre-created Netskope publisher registrations keyed by publisher name.

hardDrives.description: Virtual hard disks attached to each VM.

enableExperimentalHyperv.description: Required opt-in gate for the experimental Hyper-V component.

publishers.description: Publisher registration and VM details keyed by name.

publisherNames.description: Publisher names to register or reuse in Netskope.

tenantUrl.description: Netskope tenant URL used for publisher registration.

apiToken.description: Netskope API token used for publisher registration.

publisherNames.description: Publisher names registered or reused in Netskope.

tenantUrl.description: Netskope tenant URL used for publisher registration.

apiToken.description: Netskope API token used for publisher registration.

registrations.description: Netskope publisher registrations keyed by publisher name.

netskope-publisher:index:KubernetesPubli.description: Installs Netskope Private Access Publishers on Kubernetes with the kubernetes-netskope-publisher Helm chart.

namePrefix.description: Prefix used to derive publisher names when explicit names are not supplied.

replicas.description: Number of publishers to create when names are not supplied.

tenantUrl.description: Netskope tenant URL used for publisher registration.

apiToken.description: Netskope API token used for publisher registration.

wizardPath.description: Netskope publisher registration wizard API path.

tags.description: Tags or labels applied to supported provider resources.

registrations.description: Pre-created Netskope publisher registrations keyed by publisher name.

namespace.description: Kubernetes namespace to create and install into. Defaults to netskope.

enrollmentMode.description: Enrollment mode: token for Pulumi-owned publisher records and per-publisher releases, or api for chart self-registration.

chartRepository.description: Helm chart repository. Defaults to oci://ghcr.io/johnneerdael/charts.

chartVersion.description: Helm chart version constraint. Defaults to ~> 1.4.

workloadType.description: Chart workload type: daemonset or statefulset.

hpaEnabled.description: Whether to enable chart HPA when workloadType is statefulset.

helmReleaseNames.description: Helm release names created in the cluster.

publishers.description: Publisher registration and Helm release details keyed by publisher or release name.

netskope-publisher:index:MetadataOptions.description: AWS EC2 instance metadata service options.

httpEndpoint.description: Whether the metadata service endpoint is enabled.

netskope-publisher:index:GuestNetworkInt.description: Guest OS netplan override for the primary network interface.

name.description: Guest OS interface name, such as ens160 or eth0.

addresses.description: Static CIDR addresses assigned to the interface.

existedBefore.description: Whether the publisher already existed in Netskope before registration.

netskope-publisher:index:PublisherRegist.description: Publisher registrations keyed by publisher name.

netskope-publisher:index:PublisherOutput.description: Created publisher registration and VM details.
Publisher outputs keyed by publisher name.

netskope-publisher:index:KubernetesPubli.description: Kubernetes publisher registration and Helm release details.

publisherId.description: Netskope publisher ID in token mode.

registrationToken.description: Netskope publisher registration token in token mode.

netskope-publisher:index:KubernetesPubli.description: Kubernetes publisher outputs keyed by publisher name in token mode or release name in api mode.
